data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Sentiment Shifts To Neutral
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Alternative.me indicates that the Cryptocurrency Fear and Greed Index has risen to 49 today, up from yesterday's score of 44, which was categorized as a 'fear' state. This change suggests that the market sentiment has shifted to a 'neutral' state.

data.title: Grok 3 Now Freely Available to All Users
data.description: According to PANews, xAI announced that Grok 3 is now available for free to all users until server capacity is reached. Users with X Premium+ and SuperGrok subscriptions will have extended access to Grok 3 and early access to advanced features such as voice mode. Elon Musk stated that Grok 3 will be free for all users for a limited time. Previously, Grok 3 was accessible to all Premium+ subscribers.

data.title: Developers discover a Lightning Network vulnerability that allows hackers to remotely steal funds through LND nodes
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Senior Bitcoin developer "Calle" issued a vulnerability alert to node operators running Lightning Network Daemon (LND) version 0.18.5 or LITD version 0.14.1 or earlier. The vulnerability is related to how LND checks the description field of lightning invoice settlements, allowing hackers to remotely manipulate their payment status and steal funds.
Satoshi Labs co-founder Pavol Rusnak also issued this warning to remind Lightning Network users to update their node software as soon as possible. The newly released node software LND 0.18.5 and LITD 0.14.1 fix this remote threat vector. It should be noted that LND 18.5 was just released last week, so many LND nodes are still outdated and vulnerable.
As of press time, the number of outdated LND nodes is in the hundreds or thousands. Historically, LND has been the preferred software for most lightning node operators. (Protos)

data.title: Reuters poll: Nearly 60% of economists surveyed predict that the Bank of Japan will raise interest rates in July
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to a Reuters survey, 59% of 39 economists predicted that the Bank of Japan will raise interest rates in July; 13% believe that it may raise interest rates in advance in May. More than 65% of economists said that the Bank of Japan will raise the key interest rate to 0.75% in the third quarter.
All 61 economists said that the Bank of Japan will keep the key interest rate unchanged at 0.50% on March 19. The Bank of Japan's terminal interest rate is expected to remain at 1.00%, consistent with the results of the November survey.
According to the median forecast, the Bank of Japan's interest rate is expected to reach 1.00% by the end of March 2026. Japan's wage growth rate in labor negotiations this year is expected to be 5.00%, compared with 4.75% in the January survey. (Jinshi)

data.title: CryptoQuant CEO: Bitcoin ETF demand slows down, long-term net negative demand will indicate the start of a bear market cycle
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CryptoQuant CEO Ki Young Ju wrote on X: "Bitcoin ETF demand slows, but remains net positive.
This bull cycle will continue until there is a large outflow of ETF funds. Long-term net negative demand will herald the beginning of a bear cycle. Demand and supply are the most important - everything else is just noise."

data.title: Pundi AI and Numbers Protocol reach strategic cooperation to improve online data security and stability
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Pundi AI recently announced that it has signed a cooperation agreement with Numbers Protocol, a decentralized data media traceability platform. According to the agreement, the two parties will carry out in-depth cooperation in the fields of data verification and digital traceability, and Numbers Protocol's verification tools will be integrated into Pundi AI's data platform and data market to further enhance data security and stability.
This cooperation will enhance the data credibility of the Pundi AI platform. Numbers Protocol will create an unalterable record of digital content, track content changes and ensure authenticity through blockchain technology. Pundi AI founder Zac Cheah said that the cooperation will give full play to the synergy between blockchain and artificial intelligence, enhance data traceability, and unleash the full potential of data.

data.title: Galaxy Digital becomes Function's core contributor and seed round investor
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Function (formerly Ignition) announced that Galaxy Digital has joined ƒBTC (FBTC) and become its core contributor, and will become a "Function seed round financing participant." 
This collaboration will strengthen Function's foundation together with existing supporters Mantle and Antalpha Prime. 
According to reports, ƒBTC developed by Function transforms Bitcoin from a "static value store to a capital-efficient, highly liquid financial primitive that can seamlessly integrate various markets." (CrowdfundInsider)

data.title: Metaplanet Inc Acquires Additional Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: According to PANews, Japanese publicly traded company Metaplanet Inc has purchased an additional 68 bitcoins, valued at $6.6 million. This acquisition increases the company's total bitcoin holdings to 0.01% of the total bitcoin supply.

data.title: AscendEX will launch Pi INU 100X (PINU100X)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch Pi INU 100X (PINU100X) at 16:00 on February 20, open PINU100X/USDT trading pair, and now open for deposit.

data.title: Vitalik: Future development of Ethereum can focus on reducing reliance on centralized intermediaries and ensuring open participation remains intact
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin said that Ethereum's decentralization is reflected in its ability to operate independently of its foundation. Unlike centralized projects, Ethereum's development is scattered among multiple teams. This separation enhances resilience, but maintaining decentralization requires continuous effort. Without it, the network is at risk of external control, which contradicts the purpose of blockchain's open participation and autonomy in financial and technological systems. If decentralization deepens further, blockchain networks may evolve into autonomous infrastructure that resists corporate or government control. Future development can focus on minimizing reliance on centralized intermediaries and ensuring that open participation remains intact. However, maintaining this model requires continuous innovation in governance, scalability, and security to prevent integration and maintain true decentralization. (Cryptonews)
